The Experian for the next generation

Built for the founders they turn away.

Business today is anything but usual for the next generation. The giants price you out. We bring Brickell-grade fundability & strategy to the founders they won't take — and we ask better questions.

What if the thing school never taught you is the thing that sets you free?

Why should Brickell-grade strategy only belong to the Fortune 500?

What does it look like when the next generation owns instead of works?

Featured Thinking

The giants price out the next generation. That's the opportunity.

The Big Four start at five and six figures — so a first-gen founder never gets in the door. The gap they leave behind is the largest, most underserved market in America. Here's how we serve it.

Dyrique Mendoza · Founder & Principal · Jul 2026
Read more →

The framework

The Dyrique Method.

Every founder climbs the same staircase. We meet you on your stair.

01

Start

Get legit — entity, EIN, bank. Look real to lenders.

02

Build

Become fundable — credit, tradelines, the 35 Tasks.

03

Scale

Get funded & grow the money into a real business.

04

Lead

Protect, multiply, and lift the next one up.

Who we are

"They taught us the mitochondria is the powerhouse of the cell. Nobody taught us a credit score."

I'm Dyrique Mendoza — I grew up where money was a mystery, learned it the hard way, and now run this from 1221 Brickell, the same street as the firms that only serve the rich. An institution — with a face — built so the next generation doesn't have to guess.
